stages.name: Planning
stages.prompt_guide:
## Your Task
Create a detailed implementation plan.

1. Read the task description carefully
2. Explore the codebase to understand context
3. Write the plan document to docs/plans/
4. Include: architecture, file changes, test strategy

## Completion
When done: /bt:update {workflow_id} {task_id} status=done

stages.name: Implementation
stages.description_template: Implement based on plan from previous stage
stages.prompt_guide:
## Your Task
Implement the feature based on the planning document.

1. Read the plan from the previous stage
2. Follow TDD: write tests first, then implementation
3. Commit with descriptive messages after each step
4. Document any deviations from the plan

## Completion
When done: /bt:update {workflow_id} {task_id} status=done

stages.name: Review
stages.description_template: Review the implementation from previous stage
stages.prompt_guide:
## Your Task
Review the implementation from the previous stage.

1. Read the implementation changes
2. Check correctness, test coverage, code quality
3. Note any issues or improvements needed
4. Record your review findings in the task document

## Completion
When done: /bt:update {workflow_id} {task_id} status=done

stages.name: Fix
stages.description_template: Fix issues found in review (if any)
stages.prompt_guide:
## Your Task
Fix issues found in the review.

1. Read the review feedback
2. Address each issue
3. Run tests to verify fixes
4. Commit with descriptive messages

## Completion
When done: /bt:update {workflow_id} {task_id} status=done
